title: Anthoxanthum nitens
taxonomy: Anthoxanthum nitens is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a member of the genus Anthoxanthum, which includes several species of grasses. The genus Anthoxanthum is further classified under the subfamily Pooideae. This classification places Anthoxanthum nitens within the larger group of true grasses. The classification of Anthoxanthum nitens reflects its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
